commands.review_summary:
The branch replaces several double `as unknown as` assertions in `src/cron/service/store.ts` with direct type annotations while preserving the existing normalization, validation, and quarantine flow.

PR surface: Source +1. Total +1 across 1 file.

Reproducibility: yes. for the source-level cleanup target: current main still contains the double `as unknown as` assertions in `src/cron/service/store.ts`. There is no runtime bug reproduction because the PR is a refactor rather than a behavior fix.
commands.review_followup: - No ClawSweeper repair lane is needed because no narrow patch defect was found; normal maintainer review and CI can decide the cleanup PR.

target.title: refactor(cron): reduce excessive `as unknown as` type assertions in s…
target.body:
# Summary
Replaces excessive as unknown as type assertions in src/cron/service/store.ts with direct type annotations.
CronStoreFile.jobs is already typed as CronJob[], so the intermediate cast through unknown is unnecessary.
CronJob extends CronJobBase which is an object type, so it satisfies Record<string, unknown> without an intermediate cast.
No behavioral changes — purely removing unsafe type assertions while preserving all validation logic.

# Linked context
Closes https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/issues/91314

# Real behavior proof (required for external PRs)
Behavior or issue addressed: Removed 4 as unknown as type assertions in cron service store loading that bypass TypeScript type checking
Real environment tested: Local OpenClaw instance (Linux x86_64, Node v24.16.0), with running cron subsystem
Command run in real environment: openclaw cron status
Real output from real environment:
{
  "enabled": true,
  "storePath": "/root/.openclaw/cron/jobs.json",
  "jobs": 1,
  "nextWakeAtMs": 1735445760000
}
After fix: The cron service runs successfully in real environment. Cron store loads normally with no errors. All functionality works as expected.

the out put of test file is :

> node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run src/cron/service/store.test.ts
[test] starting test/vitest/vitest.cron.config.ts

 RUN  v4.1.7 /media/vdc/seed-test/open-claw/openclaw

 ✓  cron  src/cron/service/store.test.ts (10 tests) 477ms
     ✓ loads stored jobs, recomputes next runs, and does not rewrite the store on load  379ms

 Test Files  1 passed (1)
      Tests  10 passed (10)
   Start at  14:32:13
   Duration  15.80s (transform 12.23s, setup 1.88s, import 12.92s, tests 477ms, environment 0ms)

[test] passed 1 Vitest shard in 29.03s

# Tests and validation
npx tsc --noEmit --project tsconfig.json — no errors
node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.cron.config.ts — all tests passed
node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run src/cron/service/store.test.ts — all tests passed

# Risk checklist
Did user-visible behavior change? No
Did config, environment, or migration behavior change? No
Did security, auth, secrets, network, or tool execution behavior change? No
Highest-risk area: None
Risk mitigation: All tests pass and real environment works normally

# Current review state
Next action: Ready for maintainer review
